minting_now.description: DIVINE MINERS is an independent, transformed collection built upon the CC0 NORMIES project. All artworks have been reimagined and animated. Also released under CC0.

minting_now.name: flake cat
minting_now.description:
子供が描いた一匹の猫。
実際にシールにして、フレークのようにちりばめて遊んでいます。
デジタルの世界でも、この「flake cat」が誰かのお気に入りになりますように。
A cat drawn by my child.
I use these as real "flake stickers" on my phone case.
I hope this digital "flake cat" will find a place in your heart too.

minting_now.name: Havoc Prime
minting_now.description:
An open-world experience where onchain characters unlock premium gameplay, identity, and progression.
A next-gen web3 game, built on ETH.

minting_now.name: BurgersGang
minting_now.description:
Burgers Gang - 2222 bold, juicy, and absolutely wild NFTs on ETH that have taken over the city.

Each member of the gang is a unique character with their own vibe.
2222 isn’t just a number - it’s an exclusive crew for those who understand the true vibe: greasy burgers, loud bass, bright colors, and

minting_now.name: BoizDaRemix
minting_now.description: 8888 Boiz are Generated by Vibe coding, On chain Art for Fun

minting_now.name: Asteroid Shiba Club
minting_now.description: Elon Musk has shared videos of Asteroid Shiba multiple times. Liv, the designer of Asteroid Shiba, even attended one of Musk’s talks, participating in a live Q&A session—making #Asteroid the first meme coin to directly engage with Elon!

minting_now.name: crimecanvas
minting_now.description:
Japanese artist Crime Canvas's debut work has been released as his first NFT art piece
New works will be announced periodically

minting_now.name: XTremX
minting_now.description:
XtremX — 5555 NFTs.

A dark, high-energy universe built for early ones.

Each piece represents a unique character from a corrupted dimension.

Most will watch. Few will act 👁️

minting_now.name: Mutants On Base
minting_now.description: Mutants On Base | MAPE is an exclusive NFT collection featuring 3,333 uniquely designed digital apes, hosted on the Ape blockchain. minting_now.name: Asteroid Shiba NFT
minting_now.description:
1111 Asteroid Shiba NFTs

Built on Ethereum

minting_now.name: ASTEROID-8004
minting_now.description: The story of the Asteroid Girl and Elon Musk has touched countless hearts. To honor her memory forever, we will mint 10,000 NFTs on-chain, with 70% of the transaction fees donated to the Nevada Childhood Cancer Foundation (NVCCF).
